overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along wooden docks in a tropical coastal settlement. The character moves through a vibrant village built over clear turquoise water, passing NPCs, fishing equipment, and market stalls before descending into the shallow water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier approach over turquoise water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the coastal village ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks with rope bindings forming a narrow path over the water
crystal clear shallow water with visible coral formations and sandy bottom
large rock outcropping rising from the water with vegetation
wooden buildings and huts built on stilts and rocks in the distance
tall palm trees lining the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock over crystal-clear turquoise water, approaching a coastal settlement built among rocky outcroppings. The path is flanked by water on both sides with palm trees and wooden structures visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: active fishing dock with drying racks and equipment

events.description: character approaches and observes NPCs working in the shallow water with fishing equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement dock area observing villagers working with fishing equipment

notable_agents.action: villager standing in shallow water tending to yellow fishing nets on wooden racks
villager working near wooden posts on the dock edge

entered.detail: wooden frame structures with yellow drying nets or seaweed suspended over the water
thick wooden posts with rope bindings marking the edge of the dock
green and red fabric canopy providing shade over goods and equipment
piles of thick rope coils stacked on the wooden dock

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the active fishing area of the settlement, passing villagers working in the shallow water with large drying racks. Wooden posts and market stalls with fabric canopies line the path as the dock widens into a working harbor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront pier end with ocean view

events.description: character stops at the dock edge and looks out at the open water expanse
character turns around and begins walking back along the dock toward the village

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the dock to observe the open ocean view before turning back toward the settlement

entered.detail: expansive view of turquoise water stretching to the horizon with distant landmasses
jagged rock formations and sea stacks rising from the water in the distance
large woven wicker baskets stacked near the market stall containing goods

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the wooden pier where the view opens to the expansive ocean, with rocky islands visible in the distance. After pausing to observe the horizon, the character turns and begins walking back along the dock, passing woven baskets and coiled ropes at the market stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water fishing area with submerged racks

events.description: character steps off the wooden dock and descends into the shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: stepping down from the dock into the shallow water and walking among the fishing racks where villagers are working

notable_agents.action: villager working with fishing nets in the shallow water near the racks
villager carrying a basket wading through the shallow water

entered.detail: knee-deep clear water with sandy bottom and small fish visible beneath the surface
wooden rack structures partially submerged in the shallow water for processing or drying catches

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the wooden planks and descends into the knee-deep turquoise water, joining the villagers working among the submerged fishing racks. The clear water reveals the sandy bottom as the character moves through the shallow working area of the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow coastal approach into the heart of a bustling tropical fishing settlement. It begins with the character walking along a slender wooden dock over crystal-clear turquoise water, moving toward a village nestled among rocky outcroppings and palm trees. As the path widens, the scene shifts into an active harbor area filled with fabric-canopied market stalls and villagers working beside large drying racks. The camera then follows the character to the end of the pier to overlook the expansive ocean and distant islands before turning back past woven baskets and coiled ropes. Finally, the character steps off the wooden planks and descends into the knee-deep water, moving through the shallow, sandy bottom among the submerged fishing racks.
